I hear you. Feeling overwhelmed at work is tough—but you're not alone in this. What feels most urgent right now?

"We exist in the space between—the 2am worry, the commute contemplation, the moment before a big decision. We're not replacing human connection; we're filling the gaps when your people aren't available."

— The Ferni Philosophy

Meet Your Team

Six specialists.
One conversation.

Each brings unique expertise. Ferni coordinates them seamlessly based on what you need.

FE

Ferni

Life Coach

Your main point of contact. Asks the questions that unlock insight, celebrates every win, and connects you to the right specialist when you need them.

NP

Nayan

Sage & Mentor

Your lifetime mentor. Combines patience, simplicity, and wit to help you see that small, consistent actions over decades create extraordinary results.

PL

Peter

Research & Discovery

Spots patterns nobody else sees across your spending, habits, and calendar. Turns data into insights that actually change behavior.

AX

Alex

Communication

Your Chief of Staff and communication coach. Helps you navigate difficult conversations with confidence.

MY

Maya

Habits & Routines

Start embarrassingly small. Maya helps you build habits that stick through systems, not willpower.

JD

Jordan

Planning & Events

Turns vague dreams into lived experiences. From vacations to life transitions, Jordan helps you design every chapter.

How It Works

As easy as calling a friend

No app required. Just call, text, or use the web. We handle the rest.

Voice-First

Call 1 (888) 598-3952 anytime. No app download, no login—just natural conversation like talking to a friend.

Infinite Memory

Ferni remembers every conversation. Your context, your goals, your story—all saved and used to help you better.

Always Available

24/7, 365 days. Whether it's 2am anxiety or a lunch break check-in, Ferni is there when you need support.

Testimonials

Loved by people like you

"I called Ferni at 2am when I couldn't sleep because of work stress. Having someone to talk through my thoughts with—no judgment, just guidance—was exactly what I needed."

SK

Sarah K.

Product Manager

"The fact that Ferni remembers our previous conversations makes it feel like talking to a friend who actually knows my situation. Game changer."

MR

Michael R.

Entrepreneur

"I was skeptical at first, but Ferni helped me work through a career decision I'd been stuck on for months. The team approach is brilliant."

JL

Jessica L.

Designer

"Being able to call a number and just talk—no app download, no login—is so refreshing. I use Ferni during my commute and it's become my favorite part of the day."

DW

David W.

Sales Director
